task:
Configure the Timeline and Performance Counter Viewer in /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config (a flat JSON document). Apply all of the following edits in a single save:

1. Set `"Timeline_ShowDrawcalls"` to `true`.
2. Set `"PerformanceCounters_Active"` to a JSON array containing exactly these four strings, in this order, with NO whitespace between elements: `["GPUDuration","VertexCount","PixelCount","IAPrimitives"]`.
3. Set `"PerformanceCounters_ShowDescription"` to `true`.

The top-level `"rdocConfigData": 1` marker must still be present after saving. Do not remove or rename any other key.
